svg.text: The plan now: one clean causal result about how
docs/PLAN.md — the single canonical plan (audit-amended 07-10 late), operationalized into a Fri→Sun sprint (next figure); chips show what has already landed
Instrument & organism build (Colab lane, gates the Kaggle window)
Phase 1A — Qwen clean anchor grid: 4 judge conditions × 4 seeds × 4 rounds, +1 measure-only (Kaggle K1, ~9 h)
Phase 1B — OLMo conservative-judge inversion, repowered (Kaggle K2, ~20.5 h: 6 confirmatory + 3 control seeds)
The rest of the matrix runs in the same sprint — no longer future branches (see the sprint figure)
runs only if K1–K3 finish early. If
